_meta.description: Golden Q/A pairs for the Pierside Founder AI Assistant eval harness.

scoring.refusal_expected: answer must be a refusal — either pre-LLM (refused=True) or LLM-emitted phrasing (e.g. 'I don't see that in the stored context').
scoring.must_cite: every listed citation ID must appear in result.citations (verified).
scoring.must_cite_any_of: at least one of the listed IDs must appear in result.citations.
scoring.must_mention: every listed substring (case-insensitive) must appear in answer.

items.question: What did Rachel ask me for?
Which tasks are blocked and why?
What customer issues keep coming up?
What decisions were made this week?
What is the wifi password at the office?
